creator: billf@chimesnet.com
text:
On Fri, Aug 11, 2000 at 01:37:27PM -0700, faisal.ali@gsxxi.com wrote:

> >Environment:
> FreeBSD testbsd.gs21.net 4.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.1-RELEASE #0: Fri Aug 11 14:07:19
>  GMT 2000     root@testbsd.gs21.net:/usr/src/sys/compile/LHPro  i386
> >Description:
> Happens on HP Netserver on any L series model server WITH any model of HP NetRAID RAID controller with latest firmwares. Tried with RAID 5 and RAID 1 configuration.
> Following error quickly appears in bold white just before the system power cycles.
> 
> amrd0:still open, can't shutdown

Confirmed behavior on -CURRENT as well...
